system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Athletics TN set by opponent’s Attack
Type: Counter
Qi: 3

You bend, dip and weave in an elegant flow of drunkenness, evading attacks with ease. This allows you an opportunity, if an Attack beats your Parry or Evade score, to avoid being struck by making a successful Athletics Skill roll against your opponent’s Attack roll. On a Total Success you get a free mundane Attack against the target. Requirement: This requires the character be inebriated to perform. Cathartic: When used Cathartically, you can use this ability to defend against multiple Attacks (up to 2 Attacks per Rank of Qi). On a Total Success you can make a free Kung Fu Attack against one target.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: This requires the character be inebriated to perform.
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically, you can use this ability to defend against multiple Attacks (up to 2 Attacks per Rank of Qi). On a Total Success you can make a free Kung Fu Attack against one target.
